title: Power on... Marvel at San Diego Comic-Con 2026 — and what the comic book giant could show after the Avengers: Doomsday trailer's earlier-than-expected release
summary: Although Cretton recently said that the cameras could roll on Wonder Man 's next chapter as early as next year, this year's D23 Expo feels like a better fit for any major announcements for this series, as well as Marvel Zombies season…
